## part 2 — ANALYSIS: framework model docs (0be6225)

**request**: organize and clarify the coop framework model

**analysis produced** (in `docs/`):

`docs/contracts/module-manifest-and-handshake-standard.md`
- Formal specification of manifest format and handshake protocol

`docs/model/agent-definitions-system-and-workflow.md`
- Clarified the two meanings of "agent": external tool-agents vs in-code system-agents
- Defines boundaries: ChatGPT/Claude/Warp = external tools; BaseAgent/workers = runtime

`docs/model/agent-model-clarification-critical.md`
- Critical note: "agent" is overloaded — must be kept separate or docs/runtime both break

`docs/model/answers-clarified-spec.md`
- Q&A clarifying the framework model, operational vs system agents

`docs/model/topics-you-asked-for-structured.md`
- Structured list of recurring topics Gustaf keeps returning to: heart, workers, handlers, init, constraints, handshake

`docs/runtime/agent-execution-rules-sandbox.md`
- Execution rules for sandboxed agent environments

`docs/workers/README.md` + `worker-init-prompt-short.md` + `worker-init-prompt-standard.md`
- Worker init prompts for onboarding new agents

**result**: framework model fully documented. Critical disambiguation of "agent" terminology is the key output.

**no pending items** from this session.
